text:
From: Simran <digimkt@sclines.co.in>
Sent: Friday, September 12, 2025 4:10:06 PM
To: mayank@sclines.co.in <mayank@sclines.co.in>
Subject: PARADEEP TO MONGLA GYPSUM CARGO BULK MOVEMENT

Good Day!

Kind Attention: Chartering Desk
Account: SCL

We are seeking firm tonnage offers for the following requirement:

Commodity: Gypsum
Quantity: UPTO 16500 MTS (can split into 10k lot)
Load Port: Paradeep
Discharge Port: Mongla
Load Rate: 6,000 MT per weather working day (SHINC)
Discharge Rate: 2,500 MT per weather working day (FHINC)
Laycan: 22nd to 24th September 2025
Address Commission: 1.25%
Kindly revert with full vessel particulars, firm freight rates, and the earliest possible confirmation.
